name: J2EE Misconfiguration: Insufficient Session-ID Length
description: A J2EE application is configured with session identifiers shorter than 128 bits, making them susceptible to brute-force guessing attacks that allow session hijacking and identity assumption.
detection_pattern: META[configuration] node specifies session ID length below 128 bits flowing to AUTH[session_creation] node, or TRANSFORM[session_id_generation] produces tokens with insufficient entropy for STORAGE[session] without a CONTROL node enforcing minimum session ID length
